subtitle: Configure your calendar preferences and doctor schedules
dateFormatHint: Controls how dates appear throughout the application
scheduleHint: Define the working hours for each doctor. This helps the calendar show available time slots.
savedSuccess: Settings saved successfully! Refresh the calendar page to see changes.
rejectionReasonsHint: Manage predefined reasons for rejecting appointments. Click to remove.
unsavedChangesMessage: You have unsaved changes. Would you like to save them before leaving?
confirmSaveMessage: Are you sure you want to save these changes?
resetConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to default values? This action cannot be undone.
appointmentReasonsDesc: List of predefined reasons available in the appointment modal. Users can still type custom reasons.
